_comment: Opportunity: Ancient Tomb (Undisturbed). Per opportunity directive: the engine continuously asks 'what opportunities naturally exist at a location that has existed for 5000 years?'. Discoverable by cultivation (Nascent Soul), perception (Spirit Severing (to perceive the tomb's traps)), and luck (modifier 0.8). Prime Directive: opportunity exists objectively; player perception determines whether they find it.
name: Ancient Tomb (Undisturbed)
description: An ancient cultivator's tomb, undisturbed since burial. Exists because: powerful cultivators are buried with their treasures.
perception_required: Spirit Severing (to perceive the tomb's traps)
why_untaken: Tomb traps kill; requires Spirit Severing to survive.

simulation_notes.continuous_inference: The World State Engine continuously infers opportunities at every location based on the location's age, type, and history.
simulation_notes.no_locked_upgrades: A cultivator who later reaches the required perception will find opportunities they previously missed; the opportunities do not disappear.
simulation_notes.canon_fidelity: This is how Wang Lin found inheritances throughout his journey — the opportunities existed before he arrived; his perception determined what he found.

karmic_weight.description: No specific karmic consequence recorded in canon
